decision_reasons: source/vintage gate failed before performance evaluation
public FRED graph CSVs for representative ICE/BofA OAS series expose only 2023-07-03 through 2026-06-30 observations
ALFRED representative pages describe revisions only over the same 2023-07-03 through 2026-06-30 public window
durable timestamp-safe first-vintage coverage across multiple credit cycles was not proven
ICE/BofA index data is licensed/copyright-tagged on public FRED pages, so direct official history was not assumed available for committed research artifacts

data.official_family: ICE BofA option-adjusted credit-spread index series

representative_series.name: ICE BofA US High Yield Index Option-Adjusted Spread
ICE BofA US Corporate Index Option-Adjusted Spread
ICE BofA BBB US Corporate Index Option-Adjusted Spread
ICE BofA BB US High Yield Index Option-Adjusted Spread

data.licensing_provenance: Public FRED pages identify Ice Data Indices, LLC as source/release owner and tag the series as copyrighted/pre-approval required. No licensed direct ICE/BofA history was used or stored.
data.first_vintage_assessment: ALFRED pages were reachable but did not demonstrate first-vintage coverage before 2023-07-03 for the representative series; the available window is too short for random-period ETF allocator testing across credit regimes.
data.market_data_source: Not used; stopped at source gate. No CSV-backed market data, daemon, or orders.

model_behavior.generate_signals: returns empty weights with rejected_source_gate metadata
